name: Noble Knight Pellinore
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ペリノア
desc: You can target 1 "Noble Arms" Equip Spell equipped to this card and 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; destroy them, then draw 1 card, also, this card cannot attack for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Noble Knight Pellinore" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 "Noble Arms" Equip Spell equipped to this card and 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; destroy them, then draw 1 card, also, this card cannot attack for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Noble Knight Pellinore" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 "Noble Arms" Equip Spell equipped to this card and 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; destroy them, then draw 1 card, also, this card cannot attack for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Noble Knight Pellinore" once per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
